title: Rnd Function
parameters: maxValue	Real expression that represents the maximum
description: Use Rnd to generate random number values.
see_also:
Int, Randomize

Rnd Function Example

Here's a Rnd example that generates a random number between 1 and 10.

Function main

			  Real r

			  Integer randNum

			  Randomize

			  randNum = Int(
			Rnd
			(9)) + 1

			  Print "Random number is:", randNum

			Fend
examples:
Function main
			  Real r
			  Integer randNum
			  Randomize
			  randNum = Int(
			Rnd
			(9)) + 1
			  Print "Random number is:", randNum
			Fend
